en.name: Level 65 — Bloodstained Garden
en.shortDescription: A perpetually foggy forest of blood-red autumn trees, carnivorous flora that transforms wanderers, and massive hostile centipedes.
en.atmosphere: Thick fog, dim twilight and cool winds — nature itself actively hunts and consumes whoever enters.
en.tips: Never eat the blood-apples — it triggers irreversible transformation into a centipede. Move slowly near centipedes; avoid the mouth structures and the stump.
